_comment: Example achievements (club medals/titles + records). Copy to achievements.json. title is Croatian (hr). 'archers' lists credited archers by 'First Last' (importer resolves to ids): one = individual, several = team, empty [] = club-level. image optional.

achievements.title: Svjetska prvakinja (compound)
achievements._notes: scope: individual|team|club. level: world|european|state|other. type: title|record|other. medal: gold|silver|bronze|null. archers names → resolved to ids; team = list 2+, club-level = [].

achievements.title: Klub osnovan
achievements._notes: club-level achievement (no specific archer) → archers: []. Shows only on the club history timeline.
